startPoint.en: Talk to Sigmund in Lumbridge Castle. (via )
startPoint.es: Habla con Sigmund en Lumbridge Castle. (via)

items.name: Light sources
items.display: A light source (preferably a covered source such as the oil lantern, any Seer's headband or a bullseye lantern which can be easily obtained from the lorehound if you have 50 quest points)

recommended.name: Falador lodestone
recommended.display: Active Falador, Lumbridge, and Varrock lodestones, or teleport runes

rewards.name: Goblin Bow
rewards.display: The ability to use the Goblin Bow and Goblin Salute emotes

rewards.name: Lumbridge Swamp Caves
rewards.display: Quicker access to Lumbridge Swamp Caves

rewards.name: Cave of the Goblins
rewards.display: Cave of the Goblins (if you fall into a trap, or you have not visited Lumbridge Swamp Caves earlier)

postQuest.name: Brooch (The Lost Tribe)
postQuest.display: Return the brooch to Mistag for a lightable mining helmet

text.en: Talk to Sigmund on the 2nd floor of Lumbridge castle.
text.es: Habla con Sigmund en la 2ª planta del Lumbridge Castle.

chatOptions: 1 Do you have any quests for me?
Accept

text.en: Talk to the following NPCs about Lumbridge cellar around the castle until one of them mentions a goblin:
text.es: Habla con los siguientes NPCs sobre el sótano de Lumbridge por todo el castillo hasta que uno de ellos mencione a un goblin:

text.en: Duke Horacio, in the same room. .
text.es: Duke Horacio, en la misma sala..

chatOptions: 3 What happened in the cellar?

text.en: if Dragon Slayer has been started/completed.
text.es: si Dragon Slayer se ha empezado/completado.

chatOptions: 4 What happened in the cellar?

text.en: Cook, just downstairs.
text.es: Cook, justo abajo.

chatOptions: 4 Do you know what happened in the castle cellar?

text.en: if Recipe for Disaster has been started but not finished; or
text.es: si Recipe for Disaster se ha empezado pero no terminado; o

chatOptions: 2 Ask about what happened in the castle cellar

text.en: if Cook's Assistant has not started.
text.es: si Cook's Assistant no se ha empezado.

chatOptions: 5 Do you know what happened in the castle cellar?

text.en: Hans, in the courtyard.
text.es: Hans, en el patio.

chatOptions: 4 Do you know what happened in the cellar?

text.en: during 2026, for the 25th Anniversary celebrations.
text.es: durante 2026, por las celebraciones del 25 Aniversario.

chatOptions: 2 Talk about something else.
4 Do you know what happened in the cellar?

text.en: Father Aereck, in the church. If you have not previously spoken to him about gravestones, you must complete that dialogue, then speak to him again.
text.es: Father Aereck, en la iglesia. Si no has hablado con él antes sobre las lápidas, debes completar ese diálogo, y luego hablar con él de nuevo.

chatOptions: 1 Do you know what happened in the castle cellar?

text.en: Bob the smith, in his axe shop.
text.es: Bob the smith, en su tienda de hachas.

chatOptions: 4 Do you know what happened in the castle cellar?

text.en: Talk to Duke Horacio.
text.es: Habla con Duke Horacio.

chatOptions: 3 "X" says he saw something in the cellar.

text.en: if Dragon Slayer has been started/completed.
text.es: si Dragon Slayer se ha empezado/completado.

chatOptions: 4 "X" says he saw something in the cellar.

text.en: A light source
Descend the trapdoor in the kitchen.
text.es: Baja por la trampilla de la cocina.

text.en: Mine the wall rubble to the east.
text.es: Mina los escombros de la pared al este.

text.en: Squeeze through the hole and take the brooch.
text.es: Pasa por el agujero y coge el broche.

text.en: Optional: Mine the wall rubble to the south for a shortcut to the Lumbridge Swamp Caves.
text.es: Opcional: Mina los escombros de la pared al sur para un atajo hacia las Lumbridge Swamp Caves.

text.en: Show the brooch to the Duke.
text.es: Muéstrale el broche al Duke.

chatOptions: 3 I dug through the rubble...

text.en: if Dragon Slayer has been started/completed.
text.es: si Dragon Slayer se ha empezado/completado.

chatOptions: 4 I dug through the rubble...

text.en: Talk to Reldo in Varrock Palace about the brooch.
text.es: Habla con Reldo en Varrock Palace sobre el broche.

chatOptions: 3 Ask about the brooch.

text.en: if you completed Desperate Times.
text.es: si has completado Desperate Times.

chatOptions: 2 [Talk to Reldo.]
3 Ask about the brooch.

text.en: Search the northern most bookcase on the western wall for a goblin symbol book.
text.es: Busca en la estantería más al norte del muro oeste un libro con el símbolo goblin.

text.en: Read the book to the end.
text.es: Lee el libro hasta el final.

text.en: Reldo will force-greet you and mention the Goblin Village.
text.es: Reldo te hablará de forma forzosa y mencionará el Goblin Village.

text.en: Talk to Generals Bentnoze and Wartface in the Goblin Village. Make sure you have the brooch with you.
text.es: Habla con Generals Bentnoze y Wartface en el Goblin Village. Asegúrate de llevar el broche contigo.

chatOptions: 2 Have you ever heard of the Dorgeshuun?
3 It doesn't really matter
2 Well either way they refused to fight
3 Well I found a brooch underground...
3 Well why not show me both greetings?
1 Thanks

text.en: A light source
Grab your light source and return to Lumbridge Castle.
text.es: Coge tu fuente de luz y vuelve a Lumbridge Castle.

text.en: Climb down the trapdoor in the kitchen.
text.es: Baja por la trampilla de la cocina.

text.en: Squeeze through the hole in the wall you mined earlier.
text.es: Pasa por el agujero en la pared que minaste antes.

text.en: Run through the Goblin Mine (pictured right).
text.es: Atraviesa la Goblin Mine (imagen a la derecha).

text.en: Use the Goblin Bow emote near Mistag.
text.es: Usa la emote Goblin Bow cerca de Mistag.

text.en: Right-click follow on Mistag.
text.es: Haz clic derecho y selecciona seguir en Mistag.

text.en: 7 backpack spaces
Talk to the Duke.
text.es: Habla con el Duke.

chatOptions: 3 I've made contact with the cave goblins...

text.en: if Dragon Slayer has been started/completed.
text.es: si Dragon Slayer se ha empezado/completado.

chatOptions: 4 I've made contact with the cave goblins...

text.en: Pickpocket Sigmund for a key.
text.es: Roba a Sigmund para conseguir una llave.

text.en: Open the chest in the other room for a H.A.M. hood, shirt, and robe. Make sure to have 3 backpack spaces, otherwise the outfit might disappear with no means of receiving it again.
text.es: Abre el cofre en la otra sala para conseguir un H.A.M. hood, shirt, y robe. Asegúrate de tener 3 espacios en la mochila, de lo contrario el conjunto podría desaparecer sin posibilidad de recuperarlo.

text.en: Enter the H.A.M. Hideout in the Lumbridge forest northwest of the Lumbridge Castle by opening and then climbing down the trapdoor.
text.es: Entra en el H.A.M. Hideout en el bosque de Lumbridge al noroeste de Lumbridge Castle abriendo y bajando por la trampilla.

text.en: Search the crate near the ladder for the missing silverware.
text.es: Busca en la caja cerca de la escalera la cubertería perdida.

text.en: Silverware
Return to the Duke.
text.es: Vuelve con el Duke.

chatOptions: 3 I found the missing silverware in the HAM cave!

text.en: if Dragon Slayer has been started/completed.
text.es: si Dragon Slayer se ha empezado/completado.

chatOptions: 4 I found the missing silverware in the HAM cave!

text.en: Go back down the trapdoor in the castle kitchen.
text.es: Vuelve a bajar por la trampilla de la cocina del castillo.

text.en: Squeeze through the hole in the wall and follow Kazgar, who'll be waiting just on the other side.
text.es: Pasa por el agujero en la pared y sigue a Kazgar, que estará esperando justo al otro lado.

text.en: Talk to Mistag.
text.es: Habla con Mistag.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
